heroHeadline: 82 Days to Kickoff: Iran Crisis, Ticket Backlash, and Final Play-offs Define World Cup 2026 Build-Up
heroSubtitle: Iran threatens to boycott US-hosted matches amid active conflict; 500M+ ticket applications received as dynamic pricing draws fan outrage; intercontinental and UEFA play-offs decide last World Cup berths March 26–31
footerNote: Data sourced from FIFA.com, US Soccer, CONCACAF, ESPN, The Athletic, BBC Sport, AP, Reuters, NPR, Al Jazeera, Human Rights Watch, American Immigration Council
